data.content: Shipped commit 6906297b2f1d to origin/main. Pools swap UI now keeps full replacement list while disabling invalid targets already in pool; canSwap now guards duplicate targets before action. Quality gates run in dedicated worktree after bun install --frozen-lockfile: lint passed with existing warnings; typecheck failed due pre-existing missing exports in settings-agents/defaults; tests failed on pre-existing settings-sheet-layout assertion; build failed due same missing export regressions.
